insight.headline: Deprecating useBuyerJourneyIntercept
insight.what_changed: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook on checkout UI extensions is deprecated as of version 2026-07. This hook and the block_progress capability it depends on will no longer be supported in future versions. Existing extensions will continue to work until the removal date.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should migrate their checkout UI extensions to use alternative hooks or capabilities. They should review their code and replace the useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook with a suitable alternative. This may involve updating the extension's logic to handle the removal of the block_progress capability. Developers can use the Checkout UI extensions documentation to find alternative solutions.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants may experience issues with checkout UI extensions that have not been updated to use alternative hooks or capabilities. They should encourage their developers to migrate their extensions as soon as possible to avoid any disruptions.
insight.why_it_matters: This deprecation is important because it affects the functionality of checkout UI extensions, which can impact the merchant's sales and customer experience. Developers should prioritize migrating their extensions to ensure a smooth transition.

also_worth_knowing.text: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
App Pricing: more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events

updates.title: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
updates.summary: POS Extensions now support a background extension target, allowing extensions to observe POS events and run background logic without rendering any UI surface.

updates.title: Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
updates.summary: Identity verification for Shopify Partners is now available, aiming to increase trust in the Shopify Partner ecosystem.

updates.title: App Pricing: more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events
updates.summary: App Pricing has been updated with more plans, no-charge plan testing, and support for negative and fractional App Events.

updates.title: POS UI extensions 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
updates.summary: POS UI extensions now use per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts, starting with API version 2026-07.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now handles breaking changes to Action extensions more flexibly, reducing the likelihood of validation failures.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now automatically updates Action runtime URLs on every execution, eliminating the need for manual updates.
CLI version 4.4.0 has been released, featuring updates to App Update, GCS bundle upload, and long URL wrapping.

updates.title: Updated App Store Requirements: 1.3 Always Use Honest and Transparent Review Practices
updates.summary: The App Store Requirements policy 1.3 has been updated to clarify honest and transparent review practices for apps published on the Shopify App Store.

updates.title: Customer Account API Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout and Checkout types removed in 2026-10
updates.summary: The Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and Checkout types have been removed in Customer Account API version 2026-10.

updates.title: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision
updates.summary: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision, allowing for more granular market configurations.

updates.title: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill
updates.summary: The OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus enum now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill, starting with API version 2026-10.

updates.title: Deprecating the useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions
updates.summary: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions is deprecated, starting with version 2026-07.

recap.headline: Shopify updates POS extensions, app pricing, and Flow with new features and requirements

themes.title: POS Extensions and UI Updates
themes.detail: POS Extensions now support background extension targets, and POS UI extensions have updated line item discount handling. The pos.app.ready.data target allows extensions to observe POS events and run background logic. Additionally, FixedAmount line item discounts must represent per-unit discounts in POS UI extensions API version 2026-07.

themes.title: App Development and Pricing
themes.detail: App Pricing has been updated with increased plan limits, no-charge plan testing, and support for negative and fractional App Events. The Shopify CLI has also been updated to version 4.4.0 with various fixes and improvements. Furthermore, the App Store requirements policy 1.3 has been clarified to emphasize honest and transparent review practices.

themes.title: Shopify Flow and Customer Account API
themes.detail: Shopify Flow has introduced changes to Action extensions, resulting in fewer breaking changes, and Action runtime URLs now update automatically. The Customer Account API has removed the deprecated Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and Checkout type subtree as of version 2026-10.

actions.text: Update POS UI extensions to handle per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
Review and comply with updated App Store requirements policy 1.3
Migrate to Customer Account API version 2026-10 before the removal of deprecated fields
